attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_SHPMNT_LNS)

attributes.Sql Query:

STG_CG1_X_DV_3B18_SHPMNT_LINES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_X_DV_3B18_SHPMNT_LINES.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_X_DV_3B18_SHPMNT_LINES STG_CG1_X_DV_3B18_SHPMNT_LINES,
(
 select SHIPMENT_LINE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_X_DV_3B18_SHPMNT_LINES
 minus
 select SHIPMENT_LINE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_X_DV_3B18_SHPMNT_LINES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID = STG_CG1_X_DV_3B18_SHPMNT_LINES.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_X_DV_3B18_SHPMNT_LINES.REFRESH_DATETIME
